creator: tcberner@freebsd.org
text:
Hi there

kde@ would like to ask for an exp-run to upgrade the KDE Frameworks to 5.63.

The patch can be found here:
https://people.freebsd.org/~tcberner/patches/kf5-5.63.0.v1.diff

Two ports are moved in the process:
net/kcontacts -> net/kf5-kontacts 
net/kcalcore -> net/kf5-kcalendarcore

 
mfg Tobias
